entities.name: FLOODING
entities.description: The most predominant natural disaster in India, causing risk and vulnerability to rural populations

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study on flood vulnerabilities among rural households was conducted

entities.name: ODISHA STATE
entities.description: The specific state in India where primary data from 220 flood-prone rural households was collected

entities.name: SOUTH ASIAN COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions with similar socio-economic profiles where the study's recommendations can be applied

entities.name: RURAL HOUSEHOLDS
entities.description: The primary unit of analysis, characterized by high dependence on natural resources and poor socio-economic situations

entities.name: VULNERABILITY
entities.description: The degree to which rural households are susceptible to the adverse effects of flood hazards

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD VULNERABILITY INDEX
entities.description: A tool used to analyze the vulnerability of rural households

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC VULNERABILITY INDEX
entities.description: A tool used to analyze the vulnerability of rural households

entities.name: LOW LITERACY RATE
entities.description: A sociodemographic characteristic that increases the vulnerability of rural residents

entities.name: HIGH DEPENDENCY RATIO
entities.description: A sociodemographic characteristic that increases the vulnerability of rural residents

entities.name: WEAK HOUSING STRUCTURE
entities.description: A sociodemographic characteristic that increases the vulnerability of rural residents

entities.name: SOCIAL NETWORKS
entities.description: Resources that play a significant role in uplifting poor rural households and reducing vulnerability

entities.name: SOCIAL INSTITUTIONS
entities.description: Resources that play a significant role in uplifting poor rural households and reducing vulnerability

entities.name: NON-CLIMATIC FACTORS
entities.description: Factors, alongside flood incidence, that govern the vulnerability of a household

entities.name: ADAPTION POLICIES
entities.description: Policies formulated to reduce the vulnerability of households affected by floods

entities.name: PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Effective initiatives designed to reduce vulnerability to flood hazards
